item.dc:creator: piconuke

item.title: ILLEGAL Chaotic Meme Dump
item.description:
1. Usually I'm not for violence against animals, but in every sea city I've been seagulls are pests
2. Bro can you give me the Kim Jong Special?
3
4. Jack Sparrow's Comp ass
5. Exactly why the internet was invented
6. Animals are really weird sometimes, can someone explain this behaviour?!
7
8
9. Wholesome dad
10
12. 1996 problems
13
14. Look how dissapointed he is
15. Yoooo, thank you for making it all the way to end of the dump! If you liked the humor here, you will probably like a game I'm working on. It's partly inspired by The Stanley Parable and it is called Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse). I'm still working on it, and can't show much, but here is The Bucket of Baguettes that you can play with! So much fun, huh?! How many games let you have Baguettes??! Can you even name one? Anyways, I'm rambling. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Two more days until the weekend, hang in there, friendos : )))
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Taste the bush
item.description: This commercial got banned in 2015 because of implicit innuendo and objectifying women. The actress (Wendy Glenn) reacted by saying she thought it was funny.
item.dc:creator: OneInThePinkTwoInTheStink

item.dc:creator: TheReturnOfMadJuan

item.title: The devastation caused by floods in Brazil is unimaginable.
item.description:
Climate pollution from the burning of coal, oil and gas is supercharging our atmosphere and leading to more frequent and severe extreme weather events. Communities around the world are paying the price in impacts to their health, lives, and livelihoods.
7 https://www.climatecouncil.org.au/2024s-climate-crisis-extreme-weather-around-the-globe/
2
3
4
5
6
item.dc:creator: GlobalImageServiceCat

item.title: Shadowheart - BG3 Cosplay
item.description:
Had a really fun time doing this "Camp Look" Shadowheart Cosplay from BG3! And yes... I am still playing... I am 200 hours in and still have most of Act 3 to go... Felt pretty inspired making this cosplay, the last couple of months have been hard so it felt good getting back into my consistant cosplay again, and I adore her so, makes it even easier :D
For reference
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: A scammer is trying to scam
item.description: I received a text today by somebody claiming to be my child I don’t have any children, but I figured I would mess with them. What should I say next? I know I can always count on imgurians

item.title: True. Abuse is abuse. I put different links in the description box, if you need help.
item.description: USA: https://www.thehotline.org UK: https://www.victimsupport.org.uk/crime-info/types-crime/domestic-abuse/ Germany: https://www.malteser.de/aware/hilfreich/richtig-verhalten-bei-haeuslicher-gewalt.html And when you see that an animal needs help: https://www.aspca.org/ Comic source: https://blobbynfriends.tumblr.com/

item.dc:creator: Felimelinesk

item.title: Firm hired to assess Musk's proposed compensation package says he is not worth it.
item.description: Musk wants a pay package that totals $46 billion dollars. “The excessive size of the award, both on a pure dollar basis and in terms of the dilutive effect upon exercise, remains very much top of mind,” the analysis said. That is how much 775,000 Americans COMBINED make per year (median salary $59k) The advisory firm Glass Lewis says: * It would dilute sharholder earnings. * It would concentrate Musk’s ownership, making him the largest shareholder “by a healthy margin.” * Expressed concern that he can't possibly have the time to commit to Tesla as he is the CEO of FIVE companies. It actually took them 71 pages to say how ill-advised this compensation package would be! "Tesla" (aka Ol' Musky) syas they "created" 735 billion of market value for stockholders over a 5 year period. In other words, it's a meme stock. No, deluded fanboys created that "value". His previous attempt to fleece the shareholders, I mean his previously requested pay package was so bad it was struck down by a Deleware court in part because of Musk's "excessive ties" to the board of directors. For the unaware, Delaware is the world capital of shell companies. AKA the state billionaires use to "make legal" their sleazy, corporate shell games. https://www.wsj.com/business/autos/tesla-glass-lewis-elon-musk-pay-package-d50b63df?mod=hp_lead_pos5

item.title: A Megadump of Music from the '70s Airwaves
item.description:
Dolly Parton - Jolene
Queen - We Are the Champions A handy dandy Spotify for this collection - https://open.spotify.com/playlist/4NbW0yq1zJPGsTuwPhP87e?si=c2eb86b6f6fa4d18
Temptations - Papa Was a Rolling Stone
Linda Ronstadt - Desperado
Billy Joel - Piano Man
Aerosmith - Dream On
Gladys Knight and the Pips - Midnight Train to Georgia
Three Dog Night - Shambala
Adriano Celentano - Prisencolinensinainciusol
Jim Croce - Bad Bad Leroy Brown
Lynyrd Skynyrd - Simple Man
Curtis Mayfield - Superfly
Scott Fitzgerald and Yvonne Keeley - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HU9HQNPqSbk
Elton John - Bennie and the Jets
David Bowie - Life on Mars (Re-released as a single in 73 to great success on the charts)
ABBA - Waterloo (Sweden) 1974 A handy dandy Spotify playlist for the collection: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0exrhHsAWGFElhT5kQzSCL
Deep Purple - Smoke on the Water
Paul McCartney and Wings - Live and Let Die A Spotify playlist for all those who asked: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0Rv2rYuNQkPctHAWrdbcxg Wayback in 1983 - https://imgur.com/gallery/T1CGaYx Wayback in 1993 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4 Wayback in 1998 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2qki0gA
The Who - Love Reign O'er Me
Roberta Flack - Killing Me Softly with this Song
Dr. John - Right Place, Wrong Time
The O'Jays - Love Train
Bob Dylan - Knockin' on Heaven's Door
Bob Marley - I Shot the Sheriff
Pink Floyd - Money
Sweet - Ballroom Blitz
Grand Funk Railroad - American Band
Roger Miller - Oo-De-Lally (from Disney's Robin Hood)
Carly Simon - You're So Vain
Bachman-Turner Overdrive - Takin' Care of Business
Stevie Wonder - Higher Ground
The Sugarhill Gang - Rapper's Delight
ABBA - Ring Ring (The original Swedish version: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NSLJMAkbDnY )
The Carpenters - Sing
The Doobie Brothers - Long Train Runnin'
The Spinners - Could It Be I'm Falling in Love
Mike Oldfield - Tubular Bells https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KXatvzWAzLU
John Denver - Rocky Mountain High
The Allman Brothers - Ramblin' Man
Vicki Lawrence - The Night the Lights Went Out in Georgia
Bruce Springsteen - The E Street Shuffle
King Harvest - Dancin' in the Moonlight
Stealers Wheel - Stuck in the Middle With You
Eddie Kendricks - Keep on Truckin'
Gillbert O'Sullivan - Get Down
Cher - HalfBreed
Kool and the Gang - Jungle Boogie
Edgar Winters Group - Frankenstein
Quincy Jones - The Streetbeater (Theme from "Sanford and Son")
The Edgar Winter Group - Free Ride
Bette Midler - Boogie Woogie Bugle Boy
Welcome to My Nightmare - Alice Cooper https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iz0lXNNkqac
War - The Cisco Kid
Conway Twitty and Loretta Lynn - Louisiana Woman, Mississippi Man
Kris Kristofferson - Why Me
Led Zepplin - The Ocean
Pink Floyd - Time
Paul Simon - Loves Me Like a Rock
Seals and Crofts - Diamond Girl
The Carpenters - Top of the World
Eagles - Tequilla Sunrise
Dueling Banjos
Hall and Oates - She's Gone
The Pointer Sisters - Yes We Can Can
Marvin Gaye - Let's Get it On
Slade - Cum on Feel the Noize
Electric Light Orchestra - Showdown
T.Rex - 20th Century Boy
The Isley Brothers - Who is That Lady?
Ringo Starr - Photograph
Diana Ross - Touch Me in the Morning
Anne Murray - Danny's Song
The Rolling Stones - Angie
Dana (Ireland) 1970 - All Kinds of Everything
Styx - Lady
Barbra Streisand - The Way We Were
Maureen McGovern - The Morning After
Sly and the Family Stone - If You Want Me to Stay
Tony Orlando and Dawn - Tie a Yellow Ribbon
Pink Floyd - Another Brick in the Wall (Part 2)

item.title: This guy got game!
item.description: Most Viral Edit: I should have added this bit of info from the get go, the tall lady is Yekaterina Lisina (or also spelled Ekaterina Lisina?) a Russian basketball player turned model. She looks to have a lot of social media presence.
